title: 2 Pack Multifunctional Heavy Duty Scrub Brush | Comfortable to Hold and Use | Sturdy Cleaning Brush for Bathroom, Tiles, Floor, Sink, Shoe, Floor etc. [Colour May Vary]
features: ★[POWERFUL CLEANING BRUSH]: A well-made sturdy brush for heavy-duty jobs with a well-positioned strong handle. Ideal for scrubbing floors, carpets, tiles. bathroom, sink,

★[DURABLE SCRUBBING BRUSH]: This heavy-duty scrub brush is made from 100% new PP material, ensuring durability and eco-friendliness. Bristles are firm and well secured and perfect for tough cleaning tasks in kitchens, bathrooms, and outdoor areas. Stiff bristles can remain undeformed even when cleaned hard.
★[ERGONOMIC HANDLE]: The ergonomic handle design provides a comfortable grip, making cleaning easier and more efficient.
★[EASY TO USE AND STORE AWAY]: Rinse brush with clean water after use and store away safely. Pack contains 2X scrub brush
